title: Jharkhand Governor fills Enumeration Form under Special Intensive Revision - News On AIR
full_text:
Jharkhand Governor Santosh Kumar Gangwar today filled out and signed the Enumeration Form under the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of the electoral rolls at Lok Bhavan in Ranchi and handed it over to the concerned Booth Level Officer (BLO). Chief Electoral Officer K. Ravi Kumar, Ranchi District Election Officer Manjunath Bhajantri, and other election officials were present on the occasion.
The Governor appealed to all eligible Indian citizens to promptly fill, sign, and submit the Enumeration Form to the BLO when it is delivered to their homes so that no eligible voter is left out of the electoral roll. He also extended his best wishes to all officials and personnel associated with the campaign for its successful and effective implementation.
